legal.termsContent:
Welcome to Serenade. By using our application, you agree to these Terms of Service.

1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing or using Serenade, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the app.

2. Eligibility
You must be at least 18 years old to use Serenade. By creating an account, you confirm that you meet this age requirement.

3. Account
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

4. User Conduct
You agree not to:
- Post false, misleading, or deceptive content
- Harass, threaten, or intimidate other users
- Use the app for any illegal purpose
- Create multiple accounts
- Impersonate another person

5. Content
You retain ownership of content you post but grant Serenade a license to use it within the app. We may remove content that violates these terms.

6. Privacy
Your use of Serenade is also governed by our Privacy Policy.

7. Termination
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time from Settings.

8. Disclaimers
Serena is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for interactions between users.

9. Changes
We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the app constitutes acceptance of changes.

10. Contact
For questions about these Terms, contact us through the app.
legal.privacyContent:
Serenade Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2025

1. Information We Collect
- Account information: email address, name, date of birth
- Profile information: photos, bio, orientation, preferences
- Usage data: interactions, matches, messages
- Device information: device type, operating system
- Location data: approximate location (if enabled)

2. How We Use Your Information
- To provide and improve our services
- To match you with other users based on your preferences
- To send you notifications about matches and messages
- To ensure safety and prevent abuse

3. Information Sharing
We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with:
- Other users: your profile information is visible to potential matches
- Service providers: who help us operate the app
- Law enforcement: when required by law

4. Data Storage and Security
Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. We take reasonable measures to protect your information.

5. Your Rights
You have the right to:
- Access your personal data
- Correct inaccurate data
- Delete your account and data
- Export your data
- Withdraw consent for data processing

6. Data Retention
We retain your data while your account is active. When you delete your account, all your data is permanently removed.

7. Cookies and Tracking
We use minimal tracking necessary for app functionality.

8. Children's Privacy
Serena is not intended for users under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

9. Changes to This Policy
We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes.

10. Contact
For privacy-related questions, contact us through the app.

streak.title: Daily Streak
streak.rewardIceBreaker: Day 15: you earned an ice breaker!
streak.info:
Open the app every day to build your streak!

Day 2–14: +1 bonus like per day
Day 10: earn a superlike
Day 15: earn an ice breaker (streak resets)
streak.noStreak: Open the app daily to build your streak!

verification.approvedMessage: Your profile is now visible to others.
verification.banner: You're invisible. Verify your identity so your likes and profile become visible

verification.cameraPermission: Camera access is required for verification
verification.heldLikesInfo: Your likes are saved! Once verified, they'll be visible to others.
verification.notVerified: You need to verify your identity first
verification.promptMessage: Verify your identity so others can see your profile and match with you.
verification.manualReviewNotice: 🛡️ To offer you a safe space for women only, verifications are done manually, but we commit to giving you a response within 12 hours (though it's usually much less). Thank you so much for your patience! 🥰✨
